titleStmt.title: SII 31.23: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 23. (A.R. No. B 221 of 1937.) KOṆḌRAMUṬLA, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up on the side of the tank bund locally known as Siddhappa-cheruvu
Dated in Śaka 1087, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. It is corresponding to 1165 A.D., December 6, Monday.

Damaged and incomplete. It records the gift of one marturu of wet land situated very near (pirumḍa) the tank and 3 kha of dry land for maintaining food offerings in the temple of Mallikārjunadēva at Koṇḍamuṭra on the occasion of Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti by Vijayadēva-chōḍa-mahārāja. Bhīmajiyya is described as the sthānapati. It further states that certain Tapaya, son of Aitana gifted one kha of wet land to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sā vihita
vilōcana trilōcanapramukhākhi
laprithvīśvara kārita kāvēritīra ka
rikāla kularatnapradīpa hitakumā
rāṁkuśa śrīmanmahā maṁḍalē
śvara karikāla cōḍamahārāju
la koḍku vijayādēva cōḍamahā
rājulu śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1087 gu
nēṁṭi Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁttiyaṁdu
goṁḍamuṭra śrīmallikārju nadēvaraku
nivēdyamunakuṁ jeṟvupiṟuṁḍa 1 ṛtu
runu kha 3 velivolamu nācaṁdrārkka mu
gāniccinadatti . svadattaṁ paradattavā
yō harētivasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhiṁvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ .
dīniki sthānapati bhīmajiyyalu .

yaitana koḍku ta
payadēvaraku nivēdyamu
nakuṁbeṭṭana cēnu kha 1
dakṣiṇamuna Inscription obruptly
Digital edition of SII 31.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
